screen.flavor-is-enough-mod.hud_editor.i: Left-drag the panel | Scroll to resize | ESC saves and closes
effect.flavor-is-enough-mod.fat_burden.f: You have entered the Fat Burden state: briefly gain Resistance but become hungrier.
exercise.flavor-is-enough-mod.recovery: Exercise recovery: obesity decreased, body burden reduced.
exercise.flavor-is-enough-mod.encourage: Keep moving, your body is recovering.
item.flavor-is-enough-mod.health_leaf.we: Health Leaf can only ease the symptoms; real recovery requires exercise.
message.flavor-is-enough-mod.fun_mode_un: §6§l🎉 Liangzi grants you the power of 'Big Stomach'! You can now devour everything in the world, getting stronger with every bite! 🎉
message.flavor-is-enough-mod.fun_mode_of: §eLiangzi accepts your offering (%d/%d), %d more meat needed to unlock Big Stomach power…
message.flavor-is-enough-mod.fun_mode_no: §cFun mode is not enabled in config. Please enable it in mod settings first.
text.autoconfig.flavor-is-enough-mod.opt: When enabled, the Liangzi NPC will accept meat offerings to unlock the 'Big Stomach' fun mode
Number of meat items required to unlock fun mode (default: 128 = 2 stacks)
